description: User selects the '10-30 min' duration filter in the opportunities modal
frame_description: The user interacts with the duration filter options in the modal.

description: User adjusts the minimum pay rate slider from $0 to $8
frame_description: The user drags the left handle of the pay rate range slider.

description: User scrolls down within the filter modal to reveal advanced options
frame_description: The content within the modal shifts upwards to show more settings.

description: User clicks the 'Apply Filters' button to update the opportunities list
frame_description: The user confirms their filter selections, causing the modal to close.
